rule: DispatchEx requests IID_IDispatch through CoCreateInstanceEx and then selects a dynamic or generated wrapper
Invoke reverses positional arguments; zero arguments leave both DISPPARAMS pointers null; puts attach DISPID_PROPERTYPUT
makepy emits type descriptors and usually InvokeTypes; omitted generated Missing arguments shrink trailing non-byref arguments
generated and dynamic wrappers use DISPID_NEWENUM/InvokeTypes for iteration and special Item projection for collection indexing
